title: Those Years We All Chased the Novel
author: William Shakespeare

beats.name: beat_1
beats.desc: The obsession with the old man's eyes fuels the murder plan.

beats.name: beat_2
beats.desc: The decision to kill is made.

beats.name: beat_3
beats.desc: The first attempt to enter the room undetected.

beats.name: beat_4
beats.desc: The discovery of the old man's dead body.

beats.name: beat_6
beats.desc: The narrator reflects on his actions.

summary: A young man, tormented by an old man's hawk-like eyes, meticulously plans and executes a murder, showcasing his disturbed mind and calculated actions.
